title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CRISIL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CRISIL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!
